prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为 11412→11840→10199→9198→13171，整体呈先升后降再大幅后移的波动走势；2025 年物理类（再选不限组）最低位次约 13171 名，较 2024 年理科最低位次 9198 名大幅后移约 3973 名，为近五年最大波动；该校在陕西理科/物理类招生计划 2021 年 47 人、2022 年 45 人、2023 年 42 人、2024 年 39 人、2025 年 38 人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026 年计划仍为 38 人，与 2025 年持平，计划缩减趋势暂停。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为教育部直属 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年排名第 38 位，近年排名稳定在 36–39 位区间；东北大学秦皇岛分校共享本部 985/211 身份，办学层次与本部一致；2026 年声誉信号显示东北大学（含秦皇岛分校）评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区身份认知争议，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 82 位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平；历史投档异常记录中未见该校出现断档或暴跌信号；依托东北大学本部学科评估：控制科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、冶金工程 A、机械工程 A-、材料科学与工程 A-、软件工程 A-；秦皇岛分校招生专业覆盖计算机类、自动化类、电子信息类、机械类、材料类等，与本部优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心工科专业在 2024 年专业热度评估中均为高热推荐/推荐，社会报考意愿持续旺盛；陕西省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增长约 19.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争压力显著上升；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北省，非陕西省本省高校；该校在陕西招生占比约 1.7%–2.3%（2025 年陕西 45 人/全国 2602 人），属中等偏低水平，无明显地域偏好效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势惯性、2026 年招生计划持平、陕西省物理类考生大幅增长约 19.7% 以及核心工科专业持续高热等因素，预计 2026 年竞争进一步加剧，位次在 2025 年基准 13171 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 13371 名，区间 12871–13871 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
- 电子信息工程/通信工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（机械工程、车辆工程）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 仪器类（测控技术与仪器、光电信息科学与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、冶金工程等）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 电子商务。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 13371 名，区间 12871–13871 名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档专业为主力填报、一档热门工科专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<12871 名）可重点冲击计算机科学与技术、自动化类等王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>13871 名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校平台后再通过转专业等方式调整。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 11412→11840→10199→9198→13171, showing an overall fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then significantly dropping; in 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (no re-selection restrictions group) was approximately 13171, a significant drop of about 3973 places compared to the 2024 Science minimum ranking of 9198, the largest fluctuation in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Science/Physics Category was 47 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 38 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend; the 2026 plan remains at 38, unchanged from 2025, pausing the reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a directly affiliated 985, 211, and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education, ranking 38th on the Soft Science main list in 2026, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao shares the 985/211 status of the main campus, with the same academic level; in 2026, reputation signals show a neutral/mixed evaluation for Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao campus), mainly involving campus identity recognition controversies, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking is 82nd, with a general evaluation, indicating medium-low exposure on short video platforms; no signs of gaps or crashes in historical admission anomaly records; relying on the main campus's discipline evaluations: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-; the Qinhuangdao campus enrollment majors cover Computer, Automation, Electronic Information, Mechanical, Materials, etc., highly correlated with the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all rated as high-heat/recommended in the 2024 major popularity assessment, with sustained strong social application willingness; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competition pressure; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei Province, not a local university in Shaanxi; its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.7%–2.3% (2025: 45 in Shaanxi out of 2,602 nationwide), a medium-low level, with no obvious regional preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the approximately 19.7% increase in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees, and the sustained high heat of core engineering majors, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, with the ranking continuing to drop from the 2025 baseline of 13,171; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13,371, with a range of 12,871–13,871.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Instrumentation (Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- E-commerce.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 13,371, range 12,871–13,871. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted range prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 popular engineering majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<12,871) can focus on reaching for top majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (>13,871) should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, aiming to enter the university platform and then adjust through major transfer or other means.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年文科/历史类最低位次分别为 3437→2920→3387→2873，整体在 2870–3440 区间内窄幅波动；2025 年历史类（再选思想政治组）最低位次约 2873 名，为近四年最低（最优）；该校在陕西文科/历史类招生计划 2022 年 2 人、2023 年 2 人、2024 年 5 人、2025 年 7 人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2026 年计划仍为 7 人，与 2025 年持平，扩招趋势暂停。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为教育部直属 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年排名第 38 位；秦皇岛分校共享本部层次身份，在文科领域虽非传统强校，但 985 平台对文科考生仍有较强吸引力；2026 年声誉信号中性/混合，抖音热度一般，无投档异常记录，整体舆情平稳；秦皇岛分校在陕文科招生专业为民族学、外国语言文学类、经济学类，其中民族学对应中央民族大学评估为 A+，但东北大学秦皇岛分校的民族学专业无单独评估数据。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济学类社会热度为分化观望，外国语言文学类热度为一般观望，文科整体专业热度平稳；陕西省 2026 年历史类考生约 88500 人，较 2025 年 75641 人增长约 17.0%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；该校在陕西文科招生占比极低（2025 年历史类 7 人/全国 2602 人，约 0.27%），招生人数少导致位次波动对个别考生志愿行为较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次处于近年最优水平、2026 年招生计划持平、陕西省历史类考生增长约 17.0% 以及文科专业热度平稳等因素，预计 2026 年竞争略有加剧，位次在 2025 年基准 2873 名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约 2933 名，区间 2493–3373 名。

一档（最难进）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 2933 名，区间 2493–3373 名。该校在陕文科招生仅 7 人、专业仅 3 个，位次区间较窄。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档外国语言文学类为主力，一档经济学类作为冲刺，三档民族学作为保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<2493 名）可重点冲击经济学类；位次接近区间下限（>3373 名）需谨慎填报，建议搭配其他院校保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Arts/History Category were 3437→2920→3387→2873, fluctuating narrowly within the 2870–3440 range; in 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (with Politics as a re-selected subject) was approximately 2873, the lowest (best) in the past four years; the enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi for Arts/History Category was 2 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 7 in 2025, showing a year-on-year expansion trend; the 2026 plan remains at 7, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a directly affiliated 985, 211, and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education, ranking 38th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking; the Qinhuangdao campus shares the same level identity as the main campus, and although not traditionally strong in the humanities, the 985 platform still holds strong appeal for humanities candidates; the reputation signal in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with average popularity on Douyin, no abnormal filing records, and overall stable public opinion; the humanities majors offered by the Qinhuangdao campus in Shaanxi include Ethnology, Foreign Languages and Literature, and Economics, among which Ethnology corresponds to an A+ evaluation at Minzu University of China, but the Ethnology program at Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao has no separate evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Economics is divided and wait-and-see, for Foreign Languages and Literature it is generally wait-and-see, and overall popularity for humanities majors is stable; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% from 75,641 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; the proportion of humanities enrollment at this university in Shaanxi is extremely low (7 History Category candidates in 2025 out of 2,602 nationwide, about 0.27%), and the small enrollment number makes ranking fluctuations more sensitive to individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is at its best level in recent years, the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, the number of History Category candidates in Shaanxi has increased by about 17.0%, and the popularity of humanities majors is stable, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with the ranking shifting slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2873; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2933, with a range of 2493–3373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 2933, with a range of 2493–3373. This university enrolls only 7 humanities candidates in Shaanxi, with only 3 majors, resulting in a narrow ranking range. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range use Tier 2 Foreign Languages and Literature as the main choice, Tier 1 Economics as a reach, and Tier 3 Ethnology as a safety; candidates significantly above the upper limit of the range (<2493) can focus on applying for Economics; candidates near the lower limit of the range (>3373) should apply cautiously and consider other universities as safety options.
